steps.title: Identify variable meanings
steps.content:
In the equation $y = 0.5x^2 - 7.5x + 65$:
  • $x$ represents the number of days after the company went public
  • $y$ represents the estimated stock price in dollars

steps.title: Interpret the ordered pair (2, 52)
steps.content: The ordered pair $(x, y) = (2, 52)$ means when $x = 2$ and $y = 52$. Since $x = 2$ days and $y = 52$ dollars, this tells us that two days after the company went public, the estimated stock price is 52 dollars. That is the correct answer.
